Claim Faucet Tokens

Get free testnet tokens to start uploading files on Shelby Network. Connect your wallet first.

Aptos Token
APT · Gas Fee Token

APT is required to pay transaction fees on the Aptos network. Claim free APT tokens to start interacting with Sheltrix.

How to Claim
Enter your wallet address on the faucet page to receive free APT tokens.
⏳ Cooldown active. Try again later.
Powered by docs.shelby.xyz/apis/faucet/aptos ↗
ShelbyUSD Token
ShelbyUSD · Upload Fee Token

ShelbyUSD is used to pay upload fees when storing blobs on the Shelby network. Claim free tokens to start uploading.

How to Claim
Enter your wallet address on the faucet page to receive free ShelbyUSD tokens.
⏳ Cooldown active. Try again later.
Powered by docs.shelby.xyz/apis/faucet/shelbyusd ↗
